hero.title: Philippe Beaudette
hero.dek: Community, product, and technology leadership for complex, high-trust systems.
hero.intro: I help organizations build durable communities, clear operating systems, and products that work in the real world. My background spans global online communities, civic technology, strategy, trust, and executive operations.

profile.title: A practical operator for mission-driven technology.
profile.body1: Philippe works at the intersection of people, product, and institutions. His executive work is grounded in the messy reality of large-scale communities: aligning incentives, building trust, making decisions visible, and turning complexity into systems teams can actually use.
profile.body2: This site is a concise home base for background, writing, availability, and current work.

now.title: What I am useful for
now.body: Community strategy, executive problem-solving, product judgment, organizational design, and calm leadership in ambiguous environments.

writing.title: Notes on leadership, communities, and systems.

contact.title: For introductions, advising, and availability.
contact.body: Reach out for a conversation about community strategy, product leadership, or operating through complexity.
